headline: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Files Merger Response With Union Pacific As STB Review Advances
summary: Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) and Union Pacific have filed detailed responses with the Surface Transportation Board on their proposed merger. The submissions address regulatory questions around control of jointly owned rail entities and clarify plans to keep certain assets separate after the deal. Both companies signaled ongoing cooperation with the STB as the review process continues. Norfolk Southern, trading at $322.74, is in focus as regulators review one of the largest potential freight...
